data.content: Implementation review rejection: (1) docs/audit/beats-usage-inventory.md and docs/audit/workflow-operations-map.md ADD checkPromptGuidance references instead of removing them — this documents a nonexistent function and contradicts the removal goal. These lines must be removed, not added. (2) The commit bundles unrelated changes (history-debug-panel deletion, changesets.yml, screenshot swaps, README overhaul, test deletions for unrelated features). The prompt-guidance removal itself (fallbackPromptProfileForRepoPath, PROMPT*.md deletions) is correct. Fix: revert the audit doc additions and separate unrelated changes into their own commits/knots.
